feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,603Chapters: 29/39Kudos: 61

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

entry.title: Beacon Hills: The Drabble Collection
entry.summary:
Author: StrawberryGlock

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,288Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Tumblr one-shots about your favorite Teen Wolf characters. Spanning from G to X rated, from sad to smutty and everything in between. Content warnings and rating in the notes before each drabble, one canonical tag per blurb.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,348Chapters: 23/75Kudos: 63

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,136Chapters: 14/39Kudos: 95

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: Like a Pinprick to My Heart
entry.summary:
Author: 13Salem

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,803Chapters: 6/12Kudos: 112

Summary: Derek was, for some reason, leaning over the bed Stiles was in and hovering directly over him. Stiles now realizes that the thing that tightened over his hand was definitely Derek’s hand. Holding his. “What day is it?” Derek asks, still hovering uncomfortably over him. Not even unnecessarily uncomfortable for Stiles, though it definitely was a bit strange, but it just seemed an uncomfortable position for Derek to maintain. “The 11th, I think,” he replies, though it’s honestly more of a guess. He’s not the best with keeping track of the date. Derek’s face immediately seems to completely shift into pure relief, and it actually unsettles Stiles because he doesn’t think he’s ever seen the man so unburdened. He collapses down on top of him, though thankfully catches himself at the last moment so he doesn’t squish the man below. Derek buries his face in Stiles’ neck and seems content to just… stay there. Was he sniffing him?

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,663Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 117

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear.Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,307Chapters: 42/42Kudos: 39

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. --------------------------------------------------------------This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.title: The Boy Who Smelled Like Home
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,512Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 22

Summary: Something is happening in the Preserve. The ley lines are humming. Someone has been drawing ritual circles in clearings that haven't seen magic in a generation. And there's a boy—a teenager, living rough in the woods—who smells like woodsmoke and ozone and something impossible. Derek wants him gone. Derek wants him caught, interrogated, expelled, because the last time someone showed up in Beacon Hills smelling like something they shouldn't, people died. But the boy won't talk. The boy runs. The boy looks at Derek with amber-gold eyes and a sharp jaw and an expression of such carefully controlled grief that it makes Derek's wolf howl. And Stiles—Stiles, who was supposed to be leaving, who had one foot out the door and a Georgetown acceptance letter on his laptop—Stiles can't stop looking at the boy either, because something about him feels like recognition. Like déjà vu. Like coming home to a house you've never lived in.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: He can't be dead
entry.summary:
Author: dromlex

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,551Chapters: 4/20Kudos: 55

Summary: After Derek Hale's death, Eli calls Stiles Stilinski. He doesn't remember his face, but he knows his name from the countless stories he's heard throughout his life. Stiles returns to Beacon Hills with a secret. A secret that, when the grief becomes too much, will bring Derek Hale back to life.

entry.title: you just can't stop leaving, can you?
entry.summary:
Author: lonelyBoneflower

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,078Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 64

Summary: He was a stranger. Just some sullen guy we ran into in the woods while looking for the inhaler my best friend relied on as if it were his very lifeline. And then, one day, we stood side by side, as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Derek was a stranger, yet when he stood with us, it felt entirely natural. Perhaps, from the very beginning, my heart had recognized him as a man worthy of trust—even if my mind was much slower to catch up to that truth. After the events of the movie, Stiles returns to town. [Alternate story for Teen Wolf The Movie]

entry.title: How to kill a cheating Werewolf in Three Easy Steps (And Other Lessons in Magic Parenting)
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,661Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 26

Summary: Derek walked in. He looked tired, his jawline still infuriatingly sharp, carved from the same mountain stone his ancestors had probably been hewn from. His eyes, those impossible emerald eyes that had haunted my dreams for years, looked hollow in a way I'd never seen before. There were shadows under them that spoke of sleepless nights, of a man who had been running on empty for far too long. But he wasn't alone. He was holding a baby. A baby. A baby who looked so much like him he could be a clone. "Derek," I said, my voice coming out strangled. "What the actual hell." I could feel everyone's eyes on me. Scott's were doing that thing where he was trying to convey "DO NOT KILL ME, I AM JUST THE MESSENGER" while also looking mildly constipated. Lydia had her "I'm analyzing every detail of this catastrophe" face on. Malia was, predictably, looking bored. And Derek— Derek was looking at me like I was the sun and the moon and all the stars, which was really inconvenient timing considering he was holding an affair baby.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Just Keep Watchin'
entry.summary:
Author: sifshadowheart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,932Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 96

Summary: After a leaked picture of who might have been Ilya Rozanov at a party in Moscow involving not-exactly-league-approved behavior, the Boston Bears' up-and-coming star was given an ultimatum: billet one of the new rookies through the upcoming season, or face the potential of being cut loose at the end of his ELC if he couldn't clean up his image. Rozanov assumed babysitting a rookie would be a buzzkill at a time going into his third season in Boston that should've been nothing but great hockey and convincing Hollander to finally let him at that ass. Then he found out the rookie he'd been paired with was Stiles Stilinski, and all his assumptions went flying out the window.
